role_id.description: ID of the RBAC role assigned to the group.

x-speakeasy-transform-from-api.jq:
.
| if .group != null and .group.id != null
  then . + { group_id: .group.id }
  else .
  end
| if .rbac_role != null and .rbac_role.id != null
  then . + { role_id: .rbac_role.id }
  else .
  end
| if .workspace != null and (.workspace | type) == "object" and .workspace.id != null
  then .workspace = .workspace.id
  else .
  end
| del(.group, .rbac_role)

x-speakeasy-transform-to-api.jq:
.
| if .workspace != null
  then . + { workspace_id: .workspace }
  else .
  end
| if .role_id != null
  then . + { rbac_role_id: .role_id }
  else .
  end
| del(.group_id, .role_id, .workspace, .group, .rbac_role)
